mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id AS "productId", product_name AS "productName", supplier_id AS "supplierId", supplier_name AS "supplierName", offer_price AS "offerPrice", mrp, discount_percent AS "discountPercent", state_id AS "stateId", flow_id AS "flowId", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM hm_query.offer_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id AS "stateId", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM hm_query.offer_flat GROUP BY state_id

SELECT id, product_id AS "productId", product_name AS "productName", supplier_id AS "supplierId", supplier_name AS "supplierName", offer_price AS "offerPrice", mrp, discount_percent AS "discountPercent", state_id AS "stateId", flow_id AS "flowId", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM hm_query.offer_flat WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, product_id AS "productId", product_name AS "productName", supplier_id AS "supplierId", supplier_name AS "supplierName", offer_price AS "offerPrice", mrp, discount_percent AS "discountPercent", state_id AS "stateId", flow_id AS "flowId", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM hm_query.offer_flat WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
